heading: Cross references
label: 5182 Cross references
text: For provisions requiring recordkeeping by wholesale liquor dealers, see section 5121, and by retail liquor dealers, see section 5122.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those comprising this section were contained in a prior section 5275(3), , , prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 651Pub. L. 85–859

Amendments2018— substituted “section 5121” for “section 5112”.Pub. L. 115–1412005— amended text of section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “For provisions requiring payment of special (occupational) tax as wholesale liquor dealer, see section 5111, or as retail liquor dealer, see section 5121.”Pub. L. 109–591979— struck out “as rectifier, see section 5081, or” after “(occupational) tax”.Pub. L. 96–39

Effective Date of 2005 AmendmentAmendment by effective , but inapplicable to taxes imposed for periods before such date, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 109–59section 11125(c) of Pub. L. 109–59section 5002 of this titleJuly 1, 2008
Effective Date of 1979 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 96–39section 810 of Pub. L. 96–39section 5001 of this titleJan. 1, 1980
